title: Opening the Floodgates
summary:
Main
A few years ago, the VLCC market buzzed with talks of new offshore export terminals capable of fully loading VLCCs which would improve the export economics for US crude to Asia. Back in August 2023 we wrote a report on the topic, but since then interest in the matter has faded, whilst permitting has been plagued by bureaucracy and climate goals. In that report, we commented on several projects including Sea Port Oil Terminal (SPOT), Blue Water Texas, Texas GulfLink (TGL) and Blue Marlin.
